Aerion Targaryen was a member of House Targaryen during the Century of Blood, the only son of Lord Daemion Targaryen of Dragonstone. He was married to Lady Valaena Velaryon of Driftmark and together they had three children: Visenya, Aegon, and Rhaenys Targaryen. Aerion was also rumored to have fathered Orys Baratheon on an unknown woman.[4][5]

Contents

  • 1 History

    • 2.1 Ancestors
    • 2.2 Descendants
  • 3 References

History[ ]

Aerion inherited the lordship of Dragonstone from his father and was himself succeeded by his son, Aegon Targaryen.[4][5]

Lord Aerion kept a maester on Dragonstone.[6]

  1. ↑ The red three-headed dragon was adopted by Aegon I Targaryen after the Conquest. This means that Targaryens prior to the Conquest did not use this coat of arms, and as such it is not displayed in this article.
